rulings.Case Title: 1800 TURK STREET HOMEOWERS ASSOCIATION A VS. POLYNESIAN ENTERPRISE FUND LLC A CALIFORNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce The Settlement Agreement And For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 03, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT POLYNESIAN ENTERPRISE FUND, L.L.C.'S Motion To Enforce The Settlement Agreement And For Attorneys' Fees: HEARING REQUIRED. THE ISSUE PRESENTED IS WHETHER THERE HAS BEEN SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE WITH THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BY THE WORK OF RAMIREZ, AS CONTRASTED WITH LITERAL COMPLIANCE. THE DUC BID SPECIFIED "ONE LAYER OF DIBITEN MODIFIED BITUMIN GRANULATE" AND RAMIREZ PUT ON "3 LAYERS OF TYPE IV FIGERGLASS PLY SHEET". RAMIREZ' WORK HAS A SIX YEAR GUARANTEE. IT IS NOT CLEAR FROM DEFENDANT'S EXPERT REPORT WHETHER THE COVERINGS ARE EQUIVALENT. COMMENTS 2 - 8 OF DEFENDANT'S EXPERT APPEAR TO BE MINIMAL AND LARGELY COSMETIC ISSUES. GIVEN THIS RECORD, THE COURT IS UNABLE TO CONCLUDE THAT THERE HAS BEEN SUBSTANTIAL COMPLIANCE. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: METROPOLIS PARTNERS, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. 365 MAIN INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-472997 WITH CASE CGC-07-464504
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 03, 2008 LINE 9. DEFENDANT ROCKWOOD CAPITAL CORPORATION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-08-472997 WITH CASE CGC-07-464504 IS GRANTED BECAUSE BOTH CASES INVOLVE COMMON QUESTIONS OF FACT AND LAW. ALTHOUGH IT IS UNCLEAR WHY PLAINTIFF WAITED MANY MONTHS TO SUE ROCKWOOD, THIS IS NOT A REASON TO DENY CONSOLIDATION FOR ALL PURPOSES. THE TRIAL DATE IS AN ISSUE TO BE ADDRESSED BEFORE THE PRESIDING JUDGE. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: SYED M ALI VS. MOHAMMED BHUIYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft Mohammed Bhuiya To Disqualify Courtney Coates And The Lawfirm Of Courtney Coates.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JUNE 03, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT MOHAMMED BHUIYA'S Motion Of To Disqualify Courtney Coates And The Law Firm Of Courtney Coates is granted. Although the partnership is alleged to have dissolved in 2005, the former partners had continuing debts to address as alleged in paragraph 13 of the complaint in this case. In negotiating the Wright settlement, Mr. Coates necessarily was representing those interests as well as the individual interests of the partners because representation of a partnership is representation of each partner. Wortham & Van Liew v. Superior Court (1987) 188 Cal.App. 3d 927, 932. The law presumes counsel acquires confidential information when a prior matter has a substantial relationship to the current matter and disqualification is required. Flatt v. Superior Court (1994) 9 Cal.4th 275, 283: Henriksen v.Great American Savings & Loan (1992) 11 Cal.App.4th 109, 114. Here, the the connection exists and disqualification is required. =(302/PJM/PB)
